/usr/bin/clang++  -O3 -g -Wall CMakeFiles/starpu_adv_pipeline.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/starpu_adv_pipeline.dir/kernels.cu.o -o starpu_adv_pipeline   -L/home/eric/taskstubs/install/lib  -L/home/eric/apex/install/lib  -L/opt/hwloc-2.13.0rc1/lib  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11  -Wl,-rpath,/home/eric/taskstubs/install/lib:/home/eric/apex/install/lib:/opt/hwloc-2.13.0rc1/lib:/usr/local/lib -lstarpu-1.4 -lpthread -lpapi -lhwloc -lapex -Wl,--whole-archive -ltimer_plugin -Wl,--no-whole-archive -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
